currently.label: Right now
currently.text: Working on my Master thesis and preparing for my June exams. On the side, I develop and manage the infrastructure for Garry's School and its GTACity Roleplay community. I'm also working for several clients.

about_preview.title: About
about_preview.text: I'm Jarod, Master 2 student in Computer Science at the Polytechnic School of Louvain in Belgium. Passionate about networking, cybersecurity and systems, I enjoy learning in class but I enjoy learning through my passions even more. I also have a strong interest in project management and the role of technical project lead.

contact_cta.title: Got a project in mind?
contact_cta.subtitle: Don't hesitate to reach out to discuss your ideas.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hey! I'm Jarod. I'm a Master 2 student in Computer Science at the Polytechnic School in Belgium. My path's been a bit unconventional, mixing university with passion.
about.paragraph1: I've been into computers since I was a kid, yet far from the stereotypical geek or nerd who stays in their room. I don't buy into those clichés and I don't look like them at all. Still, I almost always have my laptop with me and I use Arch for work and professional stuff, btw.
about.paragraph2: Since 2020, I've been running the entire tech infrastructure for a content creator and friend (YouTube/Twitch) with over 1 million subscribers. That means servers that hold up under load, cybersecurity, team management, and quite a bit of free time invested. That's how I really learned the field of computer science. I love helping and assisting others, while trying to stay volunteer-based (I'm on team open source).
about.paragraph3: On the side, I'm passionate about AI, space, networking, cybersecurity and music. I listen to a lot of Hans Zimmer and Petit Biscuit when I work. I'm also a Twitch Partner, so I like blending the technical side with creativity.
about.paragraph4: Basically, I love figuring out how things work, breaking them a little, and rebuilding them better.
about.music_hint: The track I listen to on repeat when I code ↓

project_items.gtacityrp_desc: Solo development of the 7.0 version of the GTACity Roleplay server (GCORP / Garry's School) hosting 200+ simultaneous players. In-game inventory system, in-game phone system, and many more features built over 6+ months.
project_items.yelpler_desc: Fictional social network based on the X/Twitter theme, built in PHP with posts, profiles and interactions.
project_items.mdt_desc: Complete police MDT system built in TypeScript with case management, searches and real-time integration.
project_items.portfolio_desc: This portfolio! Personal website built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
project_items.info1_desc: Voice assistant with Raspberry Pi developed in Python, capable of responding to voice commands.
project_items.info2_desc: Full website built with Python, Flask and MySQL.
project_items.info3_desc: Shortest path algorithm optimizations in C (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford).
project_items.info4_desc: Android/iOS app with mini-games and board games.
project_items.embedded_desc: Smart traffic light system with ESP32 and embedded modules.

experience.title: Experience
experience.company_creator: GCORP / Garry's School - Major Digital Content Creator (1M+ subscribers)
experience.desc_sysadmin_1: Managing server infrastructure hosting 200+ concurrent clients.
experience.desc_sysadmin_2: Implementing cybersecurity strategies: DDoS mitigation, exploit prevention, code/SQL injection prevention, regular audits.
experience.desc_sysadmin_3: Delivering complete specifications from design to production deployment.
experience.desc_sysadmin_4: Organizing meetings and coordinating projects with the content creator as a client relationship.
experience.desc_sysadmin_5: Volunteer work day-to-day with billing for major projects.
experience.desc_video_1: Assistant to Professor Peter Van Roy for editing educational videos across several courses at EPL.
experience.desc_video_2: Production of educational and pedagogical content.
experience.desc_video_3: Video/audio editing with Audacity and Vegas Pro.
experience.desc_chef_1: Project lead for the launch of an online community platform for a content creator.
experience.desc_chef_2: Managing a team of around twenty volunteers: web developers (HTML/CSS/JS/React/Node.js), Lua developers, graphic designers and video editors.
experience.desc_chef_3: Technical coordination and supervision of all deliverables.
experience.desc_chef_4: Implementation of agile organization and project management via Trello.
experience.desc_civix_1: Development of the responsive website civix.be for the association.
experience.desc_civix_2: Contributed to the development of a mobile app for the 2024 elections.
experience.desc_civix_3: Tech stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Bootstrap, FullCalendar.

academics.title: Education
academics.intro: Specialized in computer science since I was 15. I completed 3 years of high school with a focus on CS and advanced math. I then pursued a Bachelor in Computer Science (180 credits) at UCLouvain Polytechnic School with the Advanced Computer Science major, graduating with Distinction (Cum Laude), followed by the Master (120 credits) where I chose the Networking, Cybersecurity and Business Challenges options.
academics.locked_desc: Diploma download is reserved for authorized individuals (recruiters, companies). If you believe you should have access, please contact me directly.
academics.locked_links_desc: Access to course pages is reserved for authorized individuals. If you believe you should have access, please contact me directly.

thesis.title: Master Thesis
thesis.intro: My Master's thesis in Computer Science at UCLouvain. The topic will be defined soon. This page will be updated as the work progresses.
thesis.desc: The thesis can cover theoretical, experimental, simulation or development aspects. It combines academic rigor with real-world confrontation, focusing on writing, communication and argumentation.
thesis.coming_soon: The thesis topic and content will be published here soon.
thesis.locked_desc: Access to the thesis is reserved for authorized individuals. Content will be available once the work is completed and defended. Contact me if you believe you should have access.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Don't hesitate AT ALL to reach out! Whether it's for professional projects, orders, free assistance or a consultation. I'm friendly and I love helping and advising, so if time allows I'll gladly help :)
contact.coffee_desc: A small donation helps me keep promoting volunteering in the tech field.

terminal.welcome: Welcome to Jarod's terminal. Type 'help' for commands.
terminal.help: Available commands: help, whoami, ls, cat about.txt, music, stack, secret, ping jarod.info, clear, exit
terminal.whoami: jarod - Belgian student, sysadmin, streamer, and a bit of a nerd
terminal.cat_about:
Hey! I'm Jarod, Master 2 in Computer Science.
Passionate about security, systems, and space.
When I'm not coding, I stream on Twitch or discuss the meaning of life.
terminal.ping:
PING jarod.info (127.0.0.1): 64 bytes, time=0.042ms
jarod.info is alive and vibing
terminal.music:
Currently on repeat:
  Hans Zimmer - Interstellar OST
  Petit Biscuit - Sunset Lover
  C418 - Minecraft Volume Alpha
  Ludovico Einaudi - Experience
Yes I code to movie soundtracks, fight me.
terminal.stack:
$ cat package.json | grep -E 'react|vite|tailwind|framer'
  react: 19.x
  vite: 6.x
  tailwindcss: 4.x
  framer-motion: 11.x
  typescript: 5.x

Hosted on an OVH VPS, served by Apache.
Built with lots of Ctrl+Z and way too much coffee.
terminal.secret:
You found the terminal, nice one.
But if you want the real secret: I listen to the Interstellar OST
on loop when I debug at 3am.
Now you know.
